rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout
rawCommits.body:
Add new AURA 3D app to the app registry with Box icon at /3d route.
Three-tab studio layout (Imagine/Generate/Tokenize) with stub content,
left nav for asset history, and Zustand store for app state. Adds
three.js dependency for upcoming WebGL 3D model viewer.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add image generation flow with sidekick panels
rawCommits.body:
Replace tab-based layout with simplified single-page flow: image
generation on top, 3D model section below. Wire SSE image generation
stream with style lock prompt. Add sidekick with Images and Models
tabs for asset management. Model selector follows ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Remove old tab stubs (ImagineTab, GenerateTab,
TokenizeTab).
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add image generation flow with sidekick panels

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow
rawCommits.body:
Create Three.js scene with 4-light rig, GLTF model loader with
auto-center/scale, and WebGLViewer component with full lifecycle
cleanup. Wire 3D generation SSE stream via Tripo. Add viewer
controls for grid, wireframe, and texture toggling. Source image
auto-populates from image generation.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add project selector, feature flag, and store tests
rawCommits.body:
Add project selector dropdown to left nav matching ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Gate AURA 3D app behind VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D
feature flag. Add 9 unit tests covering store state transitions,
generation completion, asset selection, and error handling.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add project selector, feature flag, and store tests

rawCommits.subject: fix(generation): handle upstream SSE frames without event line
rawCommits.body:
The aura-router sends generation events as data-only frames
(data: {"type":"start",...}) without a separate event: line.
The proxy was silently dropping these. Now extracts the type
from the JSON data field when no event line is present.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: handle upstream SSE frames without event line

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish
rawCommits.body:
Add IMAGE section title matching 3D MODEL header. Add click-to-expand
lightbox overlay for generated images with backdrop close and X button.
Set 50/50 split between image and model sections. Center empty state
content. Remove unused search placeholder from registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix
rawCommits.body:
Replace horizontal split with Image/3D Model tabs per feedback.
Use LeftMenuTree from features/left-menu for left nav consistency
with Projects app. Remove section title headers (tabs replace them).
Fix SSE proxy to extract event type from JSON data field when
upstream omits the event line. Update empty state text.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): use project tree nav matching Projects app
rawCommits.body:
Replace custom project dropdown with LeftMenuTree showing projects
as expandable groups. Clicking a project expands it and selects it.
Generated images appear as children under the active project. Matches
the Projects app left nav pattern exactly.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: use project tree nav matching Projects app

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence backend
rawCommits.body:
Add StorageProjectArtifact and CreateProjectArtifactRequest types
to aura-os-storage with client methods for list, create, get, and
delete. Proxy handlers in aura-os-server forward to aura-storage
with JWT auth. Routes at /api/projects/:id/artifacts and
/api/artifacts/:id.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add artifact persistence backend

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence to store
rawCommits.body:
Add artifacts API client and wire persistence into the store. On
project select, load artifacts from aura-storage and convert to
store types. Strip style lock suffix from stored prompts for display.
Link images to models via sourceImageId/parentId. Artifact save is
handled by the router — frontend only loads and maps.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add artifact persistence to store

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls
rawCommits.body:
Left nav shows images and models with icons under each project,
with prefixed IDs for correct selection dispatch. Sidekick panels
use thumbnail grid for both images and models with section headings.
Viewer controls replaced with icon toggle buttons. Generate 3D
button hidden when model already loaded. Progress messages cycle
during generation. Image preview enlarged and source image
shown full-size.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): wire parentId chain and require project selection
rawCommits.body:
Capture artifactId from image SSE completed event and pass it as
parentId when generating 3D. Proxy forwards parentId to the router
so model artifacts link to their source image. Disable prompt input
and Generate 3D button when no project is selected.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: wire parentId chain and require project selection

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app
rawCommits.body:
Remove VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag and isAura3DEnabled check.
AURA 3D is now always visible in the app registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app

rawCommits.subject: fix(aura3d): move artifact routes to project_routes to fix 404
rawCommits.body:
Artifact routes in process_routes were shadowed by axum router
merge — GET returned 404 while OPTIONS passed via CORS. Moving
to project_routes where all /api/projects/:project_id routes
live resolves the trie conflict.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: move artifact routes to project_routes to fix 404

rendered.title: AURA 3D studio lands, with a hardened nightly release pipeline
rendered.intro: Today's nightly introduces AURA 3D, a new in-app studio for generating images and turning them into 3D models inside a live WebGL viewer. Alongside the new app, the team shipped artifact persistence so 3D work survives across sessions, patched a Windows updater handoff bug, and tightened the nightly release and changelog media pipelines end to end.

entries.title: Nightly release pipeline and changelog media proofing
entries.summary: The nightly release workflow and the automated changelog media pipeline were hardened with retries, recovery paths, and smarter proof-screenshot selection, and GPT-5.5 was added to the chat model picker.

items.text: Nightly releases now prune old assets through a retryable script that tolerates missing releases, and a new workflow keeps changelog media history in sync with the latest published entries.
Added a gh-pages republish recovery workflow with a retrying commit script so transient push failures no longer strand changelog updates.
Reworked AI-driven changelog media proofing to pick between raw contextual screenshots and branded cards, reject release/CI/backend-only work, and preserve crisper, larger proof frames.
Added GPT-5.5 to the chat model picker with updated pricing metadata, and surfaced ZERO Pro status alongside usage in server responses.

media.reason: Primarily nightly release pipeline, changelog media tooling, gh-pages recovery, and backend ZERO Pro status reporting. The only user-visible surface is adding GPT-5.5 to the chat model picker, but that is a minor model list entry buried among release infra work and not the focus of the entry.
reasons: Primarily nightly release pipeline, changelog media tooling, gh-pages recovery, and backend ZERO Pro status reporting. The only user-visible surface is adding GPT-5.5 to the chat model picker, but that is a minor model list entry buried among release infra work and not the focus of the entry.

entries.title: AURA 3D app: image generation, WebGL viewer, and 3D flow
entries.summary: A brand-new AURA 3D app shipped behind an initial feature flag, covering image generation, a Three.js-based WebGL model viewer, and an end-to-end prompt → image → 3D model flow.

items.text: Introduced AURA 3D as a new app in the registry at /3d, initially scaffolded with an Imagine/Generate/Tokenize studio layout, a left nav for asset history, and a Zustand store.

Replaced the tab scaffold with a single-page image generation flow: SSE image streaming with style-lock prompts, a ChatInputBar-style model selector, and Images/Models sidekick panels for asset management.

Added a Three.js WebGL viewer with a 4-light rig, GLTF auto-center/scale loader, full lifecycle cleanup, and grid/wireframe/texture toggles, wired to a Tripo-backed 3D generation SSE stream that auto-uses the generated image as its source.

Added a project selector dropdown to the left nav and gated the whole app behind a VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D flag, with store unit tests covering state transitions, generation completion, and error handling.

media.reason: A brand-new AURA 3D app with a full studio layout, image generation flow, WebGL viewer, and sidekick panels — clearly a large user-visible product surface that a single screenshot can prove.
reasons: A brand-new AURA 3D app with a full studio layout, image generation flow, WebGL viewer, and sidekick panels — clearly a large user-visible product surface that a single screenshot can prove.

entries.title: Generation SSE proxy handles data-only frames
entries.summary: Fixed a silent drop of upstream generation events in the server's SSE proxy.

items.text: The generation proxy now extracts the event type from the JSON data field when aura-router sends data-only SSE frames without a separate event line, so start/progress/completed events are no longer dropped.

media.reason: Backend Rust SSE proxy fix in generation.rs to parse event type from JSON data frames. No visible UI change — identical screenshot before and after.

entries.title: AURA 3D layout polish: tabs, lightbox, and project tree nav
entries.summary: AURA 3D's layout moved to an Image/3D Model tab structure with a lightbox preview and a project tree nav matching the Projects app.

items.text: Added an IMAGE section with a click-to-expand lightbox (backdrop and X-button close), a 50/50 split with the 3D Model section, and centered empty states.
Switched from a horizontal split to Image and 3D Model tabs based on feedback, and reused LeftMenuTree for the left nav to stay consistent with the Projects app.

entries.title: AURA 3D project artifacts now persist and AURA 3D ships unflagged
entries.summary: 3D projects gained backend-persisted artifacts with a parent-child chain linking images to their derived models, and AURA 3D is now always on.

items.text: Added a project artifact backend in aura-os-storage and aura-os-server with list/create/get/delete proxy routes under /api/projects/:id/artifacts, plus a fix moving those routes into project_routes to resolve an axum trie 404.

Wired artifact persistence into the AURA 3D store: selecting a project loads its saved images and models, style-lock suffixes are stripped for display, and parentId chains link models back to their source images across the generation flow.
Polished the left nav, sidekick thumbnails, and viewer controls, gated prompt input and Generate 3D behind a project selection, and cycled progress messages during generation.
Removed the VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag so the AURA 3D app is now always visible in the registry.

media.reason: Mostly backend artifact persistence (Rust routes, storage types) plus an axum routing fix, but also includes visible UI polish: sidekick thumbnails, viewer controls, gated prompt input, and LeftMenuTree showing persisted images/models under a project. The persistence itself isn't visible, but the left nav populated with saved artifacts under projects is a provable surface.
reasons: Mostly backend artifact persistence (Rust routes, storage types) plus an axum routing fix, but also includes visible UI polish: sidekick thumbnails, viewer controls, gated prompt input, and LeftMenuTree showing persisted images/models under a project. The persistence itself isn't visible, but the left nav populated with saved artifacts under projects is a provable surface.

entries.title: Windows updater handoff fix and changelog capture resilience
entries.summary: A Windows desktop auto-update handoff bug was fixed, and the changelog media capture pipeline was made substantially more resilient.

items.text: Fixed the Windows updater handoff in the desktop shell, with accompanying tweaks to the desktop validation workflow and the local auto-update smoke script.

Hardened the changelog media capture pipeline with expanded screenshot quality and seed planning logic, a navigation-lessons knowledge base, and tighter heuristics that skip subtle maintenance, backend-only features, and desktop-only updater changes as non-visual proofs.
Stale media paths are now cleared when a capture fails, preventing broken screenshots from leaking into the published changelog.

media.reason: Windows updater handoff bug fix (desktop-only, not visible in a static screenshot) and changelog media capture pipeline hardening (release tooling). No user-visible product surface.
reasons: Windows updater handoff bug fix (desktop-only, not visible in a static screenshot) and changelog media capture pipeline hardening (release tooling). No user-visible product surface.
